What We Offer
Everything You Need

Tools and resources built specifically for every TPI student across all departments.

📄
Past Questions

Access past exam questions for every course, organized by department, level, and semester. Uploaded and available instantly for all students.

🧮
GP Calculator

Calculate your Grade Point quickly and accurately. Works for all departments across ND1, ND2, HND1, and HND2 levels at TPI.

👔
Dress Code Guide

Know exactly what to wear for your department before you get to school. Every department dress code clearly listed and easy to find.

Christ Apostolic Church Campus Youth Fellowship

CACYOF TPI serves students beyond the classroom. Join us for Bible Study, Prayer, and Sunday Service at the Local Government Hall on campus.

Tuesday Bible Study 5PM
Thursday Prayer Hour 5PM
Sunday Service 8AM

Share This Platform

Help your fellow TPI students find their academic resources.

https://cacyouthfellowship.github.io/tpi-fellowship-study-hub/
📲 Share on WhatsApp
Install on iPhone

Safari does not support automatic install. Follow these steps:

1
Tap the Share button
At the bottom of your Safari browser, tap the ⬆ Share icon (the box with an arrow pointing up)
2
Tap "Add to Home Screen"
Scroll down in the share menu and tap "Add to Home Screen" with the plus icon
3
Tap "Add"
Tap "Add" at the top right corner. The app icon will appear on your home screen.
⚠ This only works in Safari. If you are using Chrome on iPhone, open this site in Safari first.
